description: A Data Analyst collects, cleans, analyzes, and visualizes data to help organizations make informed business decisions. They identify trends, generate reports, and provide actionable insights using data analysis tools and techniques.
roadmap: Build Interactive Dashboards using Power BI or Tableau
Work on Real-World Data Analysis Projects
interview_questions: What is Data Analysis?
What is the role of a Data Analyst?
What is data cleaning?
Why is data visualization important?
What is Exploratory Data Analysis?
What is the difference between structured and unstructured data?
What are primary and secondary data?
What is SQL and why is it important for Data Analysts?
What is a JOIN in SQL?
What is the difference between INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN?
What is a dashboard?
What is KPI?
What is data wrangling?
What are missing values and how do you handle them?
What are outliers?
What is correlation?
What is hypothesis testing?
What is the difference between mean, median, and mode?
What is the difference between Data Analysis and Data Science?
How would you analyze declining sales in a company?
What is Power BI?
What is Tableau?
What are calculated columns and measures in Power BI?
What is DAX?
How do you optimize SQL queries?
What is normalization in databases?
How would you create a business report from raw data?
What is data storytelling?
How do you ensure data accuracy?
Describe an end-to-end data analysis project.
certifications: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate
